examples.name: Tag router
examples.description: Pass bug tickets to the bug-triage worker; block others without retry.
examples.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; t=json.load(sys.stdin); sys.exit(0 if "bug" in t.get("tags", []) else 78)'

examples.name: Title length gate
examples.description: Reject tickets with titles shorter than ten characters.

examples.name: Body contains filter
examples.description: Route security-tagged bodies to the security-review worker.

examples.name: Priority auto-bumper
examples.description: Bump priority to high when the body contains 'urgent'.
examples.command: python3 -c 'import json,sys; t=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps({"ticket_updates":{"priority":"high"}}) if "urgent" in t.get("body","").lower() else "")'

examples.name: External webhook notifier
examples.description: POST the ticket JSON to an external webhook. Do not retry to avoid duplicate posts.

examples.name: Ticket-to-file archiver
examples.description: Append the ticket body to a workspace log file, then move to Review.
